---
title: "‘Modern Perplexitie.’ By C.M. Yonge"
---

## ‘Modern Perplexitie.’ By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1900
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 10.38 (July 1900) 159-167

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
